title: canarium euryphyllum var. ramosii
intro: Canarium euryphyllum var. ramosii, also known as the Ramos Form of Canarium Euryphyllum, is a plant species belonging to the Canarium genus and is native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Ramos Form of Canarium Euryphyllum has been found to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its oil is extracted for use in aromatherapy and skin care products.
